user_message: Review the current code changes (staged, unstaged, and untracked files) and provide prioritized findings.
assistant_summary: {"findings":[{"title":"[P2] Replace the notify command's machine-specific binary path","body":"If this repo-local config is committed as-is, `codex-notify` will only work on the author's machine because the first command element is an absolute path under `/home/teslamint`. On any other workstation or CI runner with a different home directory or install prefix, hook execution will fail with a missing-file error. Please keep this file untracked or switch it to a portable command resolved via `PATH`.","confidence_score":0.98,"priority":2,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/home/teslamint/Workspace/entirecontext/.codex/config.toml","line_range":{"start":2,"end":2}}}],"overall_correctness":"patch is incorrect","overall_explanation":"The application code changes look sound, but the untracked `.codex/config.toml` introduces a hard-coded local binary path that will break the notify hook anywhere except the author's machine if it is included in the patch.","overall_confidence_score":0.84}
